zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ralph de Mountjoy於1261年出生在英國哈普爾莫喬易時，他的父親Sir William de Mountjoy20歲，母親Andicitia de Vivonne13歲。他於大約1275年與Margaret of Mountjoy在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1318年在英國武斯特斯爾享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Ralph de Mountjoy于1261年出生在英国哈普爾莫喬易时，他的父亲Sir William de Mountjoy20岁，母亲Andicitia de Vivonne13岁。他于大约1275年与Margaret of Mountjoy在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1318年在英国武斯特斯爾享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mountjoy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Devon and Gloucestershire; of Norman origin): habitational name, ultimately from Montjoie, a crusaders’ name derived from that of the mountain in Palestine from which the first view of Jerusalem was obtained. The name was adopted for several places in western Europe (notably Montjoie-Saint-Martin in Manche), and this, or the original, could have given rise to the English surname.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ralph de Mountjoy was born in 1261, in Mountjoy, Hampshire, England, his father, Sir William de Mountjoy, was 20 and his mother, Andicitia de Vivonne, was 13. He married Margaret of Mountjoy about 1275, in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1318, in Worcestershire, England, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ralph de Mountjoy est né en 1261, à Mountjoy, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir William de Mountjoy, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Andicitia de Vivonne, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Margaret of Mountjoy environ 1275, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1318, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Ralph de Mountjoy 1261 in Mountjoy, Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William de Mountjoy 20 und seine Mutter Andicitia de Vivonne 13. Er hat um 1275 in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Margaret of Mountjoy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1318 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Worcestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph de Mountjoy è nato il nel 1261 nel Mountjoy, Hampshire, England, il suo padre, Sir William de Mountjoy, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Andicitia de Vivonne, aveva 13 anni. Lui sposato Margaret of Mountjoy circa 1275, nel Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1318, nel Worcestershire, England, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph de Mountjoyが1261年にイギリスハンプシュアイアモウントジョイで生まれた時，父Sir William de Mountjoyは20歳，母Andicitia de Vivonneは13歳であった。約1275年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアでMargaret of Mountjoyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1318年にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph de Mountjoy(이)가 1261년 영국 함프실르 모우트조이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William de Mountjoy(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Andicitia de Vivonne(은)는 13세였다. 그는 대략 1275년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 Margaret of Mountjoy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1318년 영국 워스스터실르에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph de Mountjoy nasceu em 1261, em Mountjoy, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir William de Mountjoy, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Andicitia de Vivonne, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret of Mountjoy aproximadamente 1275, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1318, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ralph de Mountjoy родился в 1261 г. в местности маунтджои, хампшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir William de Mountjoy было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Andicitia de Vivonne, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret of Mountjoy около 1275 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1318 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Ralph de Mountjoy nació en 1261, en Mountjoy, Hampshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir William de Mountjoy, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Andicitia de Vivonne, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Margaret of Mountjoy aproximadamente 1275, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1318, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años.
